examples: Piles of books and newspapers littered the floor.
She slogged her way through four piles of ironing.
They rummage through piles of secondhand clothes for something that fits.
Bars of olive-oil soap share counter space with piles of lokum (Turkish Delight) and slabs of amber-hued honeycomb.
Drexel billions that have allowed staggering fortunes to start and grow into earth shattering piles.
